data.title: Bitwise: Trump's strategic Bitcoin reserve will have a chain reaction, and other countries may follow suit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analysts said that Trump's US Bitcoin reserves are expected to promote the global adoption of Bitcoin, promote institutional investment and consolidate its status as a strategic asset. Ryan Rasmussen, head of research at Bitwise, expects that the US Bitcoin reserves will have a chain effect, and other countries and private investors will be more confident in investing in Bitcoin. The final result will by no means be the US government buying all the Bitcoin in the world. In addition, large institutional investors, such as wealth management companies, financial institutions and pension plans, now have no reason not to increase their investment in Bitcoin and other crypto assets recognized by the Trump administration. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Viewpoint: The expectation of "no selling" has been digested by the market, and the crypto industry hopes that the US government will buy and accumulate Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump has signed an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate digital asset reserve. These cryptocurrencies are obtained through confiscation, but the US government will not acquire additional assets for the reserve. Steven Lubka, head of private clients and family offices at Swan Bitcoin, a Bitcoin-focused financial services company, said that while not selling confiscated Bitcoins may be a good start, the crypto industry ultimately hopes to see the US government buy and accumulate Bitcoins. Not selling confiscated Bitcoins is primarily beneficial at the signal and narrative level, but the news has been digested by much of the market. (marketwatch)

data.title: U.S. Congressman Nick Begich: It’s time for the U.S. to become the first Bitcoin superpower
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Congressman Nick Begich said today, "Now is the time for the United States to become the first Bitcoin superpower. I am working with Cynthia Lummis, the proposer of the Bitcoin Strategic Reserve Act and chair of the Senate Banking Digital Assets Subcommittee, to promote major issues. I expect to release major news next Tuesday."

data.title: Planet Evening News
Bitget Launchpool project ELX is open for investment, and the lock-up period ends at 18:00 on March 10
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Launchpool project ELX has been opened for investment. As of press time, the current BGB reward pool yield is temporarily reported at 108.75% APR, and the DEUSD reward pool yield is temporarily reported at 142.43% APR. The lock-up opening time is from 18:00 on March 7 to 18:00 on March 10 (UTC+8)

data.title: CoinFund: If Trump leaves office in four years, the fate of the US strategic crypto reserves will be affected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump has signed an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate digital asset reserve. Seth Ginns, head of liquid investment at crypto investment company CoinFund, said: "Although on the surface, the US crypto reserve enforced by the presidential executive order is a good thing, but if the next government in four years is critical of Bitcoin, the fate of the reserve will be worrying. Over time, it is better to have a congressional authorization to protect the crypto reserve from the influence of the next government." (Marketwatch)

data.title: Trump hints at possibly extending TikTok ban deadline
data.description:
On Thursday, Trump suggested that he may extend TikTok’s sale or ban deadline if a deal for the China-owned app isn’t reached within the 75-day negotiation period ending on 5th April.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-hints-extending-tiktok-deadline/

data.title: Bitcoin and four other currencies may be considered for inclusion in the US strategic reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Reuters: Bitcoin and four other currencies may be considered for inclusion in the US strategic reserves

data.title: IntoTheBlock: Over $500 million in ETH was withdrawn from exchanges this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to IntoTheBlock data, more than $500 million in ETH flowed out of exchanges this week, indicating that ETH traders are still actively accumulating and market buying sentiment is strong.

data.title: SlowMist: 1inch old version of Fusion contract vulnerability caused losses of more than $5 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On March 5, the 1inch team discovered a vulnerability in its old version of the Fusion v1 parser smart contract. According to the analysis of the SlowMist Security Team, the incident caused a loss of about 2.4 million USDC and 1,276 WETH, totaling more than 5 million US dollars.
The official confirmed that the vulnerability did not affect the funds of end users, and the only affected object was the parser contract using Fusion v1. 1inch has taken measures and is continuing to follow up on the security situation.
